Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.view

Class BoardView3D

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.SubScene
com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class BoardView3D extends javafx.scene.SubScene
3D view of the 10x10 board. Wraps its own SubScene with a perspective camera and lights, so it can be embedded inside any 2D layout of the rest of the interface (for example inside a BorderPane or StackPane of the main JavaFX/FXML application).

Note: JavaFX does not allow mixing 2D and 3D nodes in the same scene graph; that is why everything the player sees (water, ships and shot marks) lives inside this SubScene.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BoardView3D(double width, double height)
    Builds a single 10x10 board, its own fixed camera, lighting, and water grid, ready to have ships and shot marks added to it.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addMark(javafx.scene.Node mark)
    Adds any shot mark (water miss, hit, etc.) generated by ShotMark3D.
    void
    addShip(Ship3D ship)
    Adds an already built ship (position and orientation are set at creation time).
    private void
    buildWaterGrid()
    Fills root3D with one Water3D tile per cell of the 10x10 grid.
    private void
    setupCamera()
    Builds and installs a fixed, tilted-down camera framing the whole board -- see the rig comments below for why it's built this way.
    private void
    setupLights()
    Adds a soft ambient fill light plus one point light, so the board's shapes read with visible shading instead of flat silhouettes.

  • Constructor Details

    • BoardView3D

      public BoardView3D(double width, double height)
      Builds a single 10x10 board, its own fixed camera, lighting, and water grid, ready to have ships and shot marks added to it.
      Parameters:
      width - initial width of the embedded SubScene
      height - initial height of the embedded SubScene

  • Method Details

    • buildWaterGrid

      private void buildWaterGrid()
      Fills root3D with one Water3D tile per cell of the 10x10 grid.

    • setupCamera

      private void setupCamera()
      Builds and installs a fixed, tilted-down camera framing the whole board -- see the rig comments below for why it's built this way.

    • setupLights

      private void setupLights()
      Adds a soft ambient fill light plus one point light, so the board's shapes read with visible shading instead of flat silhouettes.

    • addShip

      public void addShip(Ship3D ship)
      Adds an already built ship (position and orientation are set at creation time).

    • addMark

      public void addMark(javafx.scene.Node mark)
      Adds any shot mark (water miss, hit, etc.) generated by ShotMark3D.
